hero.description: By the time you feel thirsty, dehydration has already begun. EASYCHECK reads your hydration in real time — straight from your wrist.
hero.caption: Free download · Smartwatch required

certifications.cert5: UNIST Heat Wave Research Center partner

stats.title: The hottest summer on record is coming.
stats.description: Record heat is becoming the new normal worldwide. This summer is projected to be the hottest yet — and your body will feel it before you do.

chart.ariaLabel: Summer average temperature trend from 2019 to 2026 — 2026 is the highest at 26.4°C
chart.headline: Hottest summer in 8 years

problem.title: Dehydration doesn't treat everyone equally.
problem.description: Anyone can get dehydrated. For some, it happens faster — and quieter.

outdoor.label: Outdoor Workers
outdoor.title: We sweat the small stuff. So you don't have to.
outdoor.body: Construction crews, delivery riders, farm workers — when you sweat for a living, fluid loss outpaces what you feel.
outdoor.quote: “I thought I could push through. It was dehydration.”

elderly.label: Seniors & Caregivers
elderly.title: “I'm fine” is not a measurement.
elderly.body: With age, the sense of thirst fades. Many seniors are dehydrated without ever feeling it — and without anyone knowing.
elderly.quote: “She always said she was fine. Now I can actually check.”

office.label: Office Workers
office.title: That's not fatigue. That's thirst.
office.body: Sitting all day, running on coffee — chronic mild dehydration looks a lot like burnout. The dry throat, the afternoon fog: your body asking for water.
office.quote: “I was tired, so I drank more coffee. Turns out I needed water.”

solution.title: One watch. Your hydration, in real time.
solution.description: EASYCHECK analyzes PPG signals from your smartwatch using AI to instantly check your body's hydration index.

step1.label: STEP 1
step1.title: Wear it
step1.body: Put on your smartwatch and PPG measurement starts automatically. No needles. No blood. Nothing extra.

step2.label: STEP 2
step2.title: AI reads between the beats
step2.body: Our physics-based deep learning model converts your PPG waveform into a spectrogram and computes your hydration index.

step3.label: STEP 3
step3.title: Know before thirst
step3.body: When your index hits the threshold, you get an instant alert — with trends and intake guidance in the app.

highlight.title: You can lead yourself to water. We'll tell you when.
highlight.description: While other wearables record what already happened, EASYCHECK alerts you before dehydration sets in.

tech.title: Why EASYCHECK is different
tech.description: Other wearables count your steps. EASYCHECK reads what's inside.

ai.title: PPG-to-spectrogram AI
ai.body: A multi-model deep learning ensemble using time-frequency transforms (STFT/CWT) — not simple waveform analysis.

severance.title: Built on hospital research
severance.body: Developed and validated with the Department of Emergency Medicine at Severance Hospital, Seoul.

watch.title: Optimized for smartwatches
watch.body: A signal pipeline tuned for wrist-worn PPG sensors. Accurate readings during everyday wear.

alert.title: Alerts that come first
alert.body: An alert-driven algorithm that notifies you the moment your index crosses the threshold — before thirst does.

download.title: It’s what’s inside that counts. Now you can count it.
download.description: All you need is a smartwatch. EASYCHECK alerts you before thirst ever kicks in.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: EASYCHECK is a wellness device, not a medical device. The hydration index is provided for general wellness reference only and is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
